Premium

Pattern & Volume Profile

This script is an automated technical analysis tool that detects classical chart patterns like flags, wedges, and triangles using pivot point geometry. It projects localized volume profiles within these structures while calculating dynamic entry, stop-loss, and multi-tier target levels for automated alert execution.

View on TradingView
Free

Liquidity Radar Engine

The Liquidity Radar Engine identifies trade setups by detecting liquidity sweeps, equal highs or lows, and structural market shifts. It validates these signals using volume delta, momentum divergence, and Fair Value Gaps to dynamically manage trade entries, targets, and trailing stops.

View on TradingView
Free

Williams VIX Fix Elite

This indicator identifies market reversals using a Williams VIX Fix methodology, applying multi-factor filters for trend, volatility, and volume to generate entry signals. It features an integrated trade management dashboard that displays SL/TP levels and provides automated alerts for precise execution.

View on TradingView
Free

Dynamic MSS Navigator

The Dynamic MSS Navigator identifies market structure shifts using price action, ATR-based volatility filters, and volume analysis to generate trade signals with automated risk management levels. It includes a customizable dashboard, visual heatmap, and alert system to support trend-following strategies across multiple timeframes.

View on TradingView
Free

Liquidity Entry Signals

This indicator identifies market liquidity sweeps by detecting price breakouts of recent highs or lows followed by a reversal, incorporating trend, volatility, and volume filters for trade confirmation. It provides automated trade management tools including stop-loss, three take-profit levels, a real-time performance dashboard, and JSON-formatted alert payloads for execution.

View on TradingView
Premium

Smart Gap Concepts Pro

This indicator identifies and visualizes various market gap types, including structural, exhaustion, and island reversal patterns, using volume-based filtering and multi-timeframe analysis. It features a management system with gap merging, session-based filters, and a dashboard for monitoring institutional liquidity zones and price clusters.

View on TradingView
Free

Cumulative Rejection Heatmap

This indicator identifies price rejection levels by calculating wick-to-range ratios and visualizing the resulting data as a cumulative volume-at-price heatmap. It also generates automated buy/sell alerts and displays a dashboard tracking key support/resistance zones and market bias.

View on TradingView
Free

Cardwell Range Analyze

This indicator identifies trend-aligned trade regimes by confirming specific RSI ranges against a moving average trend and ADX strength filter. It visually plots entry, stop-loss, and take-profit levels while generating actionable trade signals based on these momentum-based parameters.

View on TradingView
Free

Triple Confluence Navigator

The Triple Confluence Navigator identifies trading signals by aligning RSI-based momentum, adaptive trend filtering, and structural market breakouts. It provides automated entry and exit levels with risk-to-reward visualization and a real-time dashboard for trend confirmation.

View on TradingView
Free

Multi-Indicator Confluence Strategy Automator

The Multi-Indicator Confluence Strategy Automator (MICSA) generates trend-following entry signals by aggregating HMA, ADX, CCI, and volume data. It features dynamic risk management levels and advanced filters including Hurst regime detection, momentum inflation ratios, and cross-asset correlation.

View on TradingView
Premium

Auto Pattern Detector Targets Pro

The Auto Pattern Detector Targets Pro is an advanced Pine Script indicator that automatically identifies classic chart patterns like flags, wedges, and head and shoulders, plotting precise entry, stop-loss, and target levels. It features a comprehensive analytical dashboard that enhances trade management using dynamic position sizing, multi-level take-profits, and intelligent volume or market structure filters.

View on TradingView
Free

Elliott Wave Scanner

Automatically scans and visualizes Elliott Wave impulse and corrective patterns using pivot points, Fibonacci retracements, and trend filters. It provides trade signals with entry, stop-loss, and target levels while displaying a real-time dashboard for pattern analysis and market bias confirmation.

View on TradingView
Free

Adaptive RSI Supertrend

This indicator combines an adaptive RSI with a Supertrend-based filter to identify trend-following signals and market regimes. It features a technical dashboard and dynamic support and resistance levels to assist with trade execution and analysis.

View on TradingView
Free

Dynamic Gravity Attractor (DGA)

The Dynamic Gravity Attractor (DGA) identifies potential support and resistance levels by clustering historical price pivots weighted by volume and touch frequency. It visualizes these levels as a gravitational field to determine market bias and net force while providing dynamic alerts for approaching key zones or shifts in market sentiment.

View on TradingView
Free

Cardwell RSI Trade Navigator

This indicator utilizes Relative Moving Average (RMA) crossovers of RSI values to generate trend-following trade signals filtered by ADX strength and higher-timeframe bias. It includes integrated risk management tools like ATR-based stop losses, multiple take-profit targets, and a real-time dashboard for performance tracking.

View on TradingView
Free

Intra-Candle Pressure Dissector

The Intra-Candle Pressure Dissector calculates market pressure by weighting six dimensions like volume, inertia, and efficiency to visualize trend intensity and momentum. It highlights potential fake moves and institutional absorption, providing a dashboard for multi-factor technical analysis across chosen timeframes.

View on TradingView
Free

Historical Pattern Projection

This indicator identifies historical price patterns by calculating z-scores and Pearson correlations to project future movements via a ghost path. It provides a real-time dashboard and automated trade alerts based on the statistical similarity of past market behavior.

Free

Market Weariness Spectrum Indicator

The Market Weariness Spectrum Indicator (MWSI) evaluates market exhaustion by synthesizing volume-per-price movement, directional hesitation, and effort-density metrics. It generates reversal and recovery signals when the composite score crosses critical threshold levels, providing visual dashboard alerts for potential market trend exhaustion.

View on TradingView
Free

View on TradingView

Bernoulli Process: Trend Probability & Entropy

This indicator calculates the Bernoulli probability of price trends over a defined window to identify bullish, bearish, or noisy market regimes. It visualizes these probabilities and generates automated JSON-formatted trade signals with risk-managed entry, stop-loss, and take-profit levels.

This indicator calculates multi-level Pivot Points using higher timeframe data for institutional support and resistance analysis. It employs exponential moving averages to dynamically smooth these pivot levels for enhanced trend visibility.

This indicator calculates a time-weighted and imbalance-adjusted volume ratio to quantify bullish versus bearish sentiment. It smooths the resulting ratio and applies statistical filtering to identify overbought, oversold, and high-volume conditions.

ARCH Proxy

This indicator calculates an ARCH-style volatility proxy using squared returns to quantify market turbulence over a defined lookback period. It generates visual volatility bands against a mean baseline to highlight significant high and low regime transitions.

This indicator calculates the divergence between cumulative accumulation/distribution flow and its exponential moving average to identify buying and selling pressure. The resulting oscillator plots momentum relative to a zero line, providing a visual gauge for institutional order flow trends.
